reviews.comment:
Se tarda mucho en cargar combustible. Hay solo dos empleados para cuatro bocas de carga

(Translated by Google)
It takes a long time to refuel. There are only two employees for four pumps.

reviews.comment:
Café con leche bien, el baño muy, muy sucio es lamentable!!!!!!!!. Deberían tenerlo en cuenta por favor!!!. Gracias!

(Translated by Google)
The coffee with milk was good, but the bathroom was very, very dirty—it's appalling! You should definitely take this into account! Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdzZiamFREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy completo,bien higienizado los baños ,es YPF pero tiene un comedor bastante completo muchísimos vehículos de toda índole en sus instalaciones

(Translated by Google)
Very complete, the bathrooms are well cleaned, it's a YPF station but it has a fairly complete dining area and many vehicles of all kinds on its premises

reviews.comment:
Excelente motel para hacer un alto en la ruta, de muy buena calidad. Complejo el desayuno, pero muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent motel for a stopover, very good quality. Breakfast was complicated, but highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
MUY AMABLE DE TODO EL PERSONAL TANTO DE LOS PLAYEROS Y DE LA CAFETERIA FELICITACIONES  SIGAN ASI !!

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly staff from both the beach attendants and the cafeteria. Congratulations, keep it up!
